# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3  # Isitio API version to use  ^- . / v* versions should be same, but not necessarily so because it changes with every new istio release..
kind: Gateway
metadata:
 name: ingressgateway    # Name of the gateway resource. It's a required field in all resources (Ingress and Service).
spec:
 selector:  {a-label/app:"mybookinfo"}   // this selectors matches your service for route configuring to use it . This should be same as what we are sending at routing phase, so that Istio can pick the right sidecar.   ^--- in current form without any other services related data provided above ^-
